start.title: Open project
settings.uiLanguage.title: Interface Language
settings.theme.title: Theme
settings.textLanguage.title: Text Language
settings.textLanguage.description: Language used in AI-generated story texts and lore items.
settings.aiEngine.title: Current AI Engine
settings.aiEngine.description: Controls the sync-status icon in the Lore Tree. Required credentials must be saved before activating an engine.
engine.grok.name: Grok AI
engine.grok.notes: Maximum 10 files per request. No vector/collection search.
engine.grok.field.api_key.label: API Key
engine.yandex.name: Yandex Cloud AI
engine.yandex.notes: Subject to Russian Federation content regulations. No LGBTQ+ or political content.
engine.yandex.field.api_key.label: API Key
engine.yandex.field.folder_id.label: Folder ID
engine.yandex.field.folder_id.hint: Your Yandex Cloud folder ID (e.g. b1gXXXXXXXXXX). Models use URI: gpt://{folder_id}/{model}/latest
capability.fileUpload.label: File Upload
capability.fileUpload.description: Upload documents (PDF, TXT, etc.) to persistent AI storage. Uploaded files can be reused across multiple requests without re-uploading.
capability.fileAttachment.label: File Attachment
capability.fileAttachment.description: Reference an uploaded file in a specific request so the model can read its contents directly.
capability.knowledgeBase.label: Knowledge Base
capability.knowledgeBase.description: Build a searchable vector or hybrid index from uploaded files (RAG — Retrieval-Augmented Generation). Also called: Vector Store, SearchIndex, Collection.
capability.knowledgeBaseAttachment.label: Knowledge Base Attachment
capability.knowledgeBaseAttachment.descr: Attach a pre-built Knowledge Base (vector store / search index) to a generation request so the model automatically retrieves relevant context from it. Also called: Search Index Tool (Yandex), Collections Search Tool (xAI Grok), file_search (OpenAI).
settings.models.title: Available Models
settings.debug.title: Debug
settings.debug.verboseAiLoggingDescripti: Prints full request headers (API key masked) and body to the server console for every AI API call. Use when diagnosing AI integration issues.
